title: Linen for Ireland
writer: Stefan von Kamare, Harald Bratt, Philipp von Zeska
actors: Otto Treßler, Irene von Meyendorff, Friedl Haerlin
plot: Anti-Semitic Nazi propaganda film that "shows" how Jewish textile company owners are sabotaging the German linen industry by buying linen from Ireland instead of having it produced in "the Fatherland".
